summary: Self-hosted OSRM v5.27.1 integration testing complete. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). OSRM running on localhost:5000 with India OSM data. Redis route caching working with Nagarik:route:* keys and 1800s TTL. All safe-route, predictive-alert, safety-score, and city-heatmap endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads and works correctly with all navigation sections accessible.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/system/osrm-status returns {osrm: 'connected', source: 'self-hosted', url: 'http://localhost:5000', test_route: 'ok'} - VERIFIED
POST /api/safe-route returns 3 routes (fastest/safest/balanced) with distance_km and risk_score - VERIFIED
Redis route caching working: Nagarik:route:* keys created with TTL ~1800s - VERIFIED
POST /api/predictive-alert with location returns alerts correctly - VERIFIED
POST /api/predictive-alert/with-alternative returns alerts with optional alternative routes - VERIFIED
POST /api/auth/login for operator returns valid JWT with role='operator' - VERIFIED
POST /api/auth/login for guardian returns valid JWT with role='guardian' - VERIFIED
GET /api/safety-score/location?lat=12.9716&lng=77.5946 returns score with percentile - VERIFIED
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/live returns 622 cells from Redis - VERIFIED
Direct OSRM access (curl localhost:5000) returns routes in <50ms latency - VERIFIED
osrm_service.py implements self-hosted primary with public OSRM fallback - CODE REVIEWED
safe_route_engine.py and route_safety_engine.py use centralized osrm_service instead of direct HTTP - CODE REVIEWED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Dashboard, City Heatmap, Safe Route AI pages working)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing data from previous phases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-hosted OSRM v5.27.1 running at localhost:5000 with India OSM data (~36ms latency). Redis route caching enabled with key pattern Nagarik:route:{hash} and TTL 1800s. osrm_service.py provides centralized routing with self-hosted primary and public OSRM fallback. All routing engines (safe_route_engine.py, route_safety_engine.py) use the centralized service. City heatmap shows 622 cells from Redis cache.

frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with Nagarik branding - SUCCESS
Dashboard loads with all navigation items - SUCCESS
City Heatmap page shows 'Live heatmap: 622 cells, 0 critical' - SUCCESS
City Heatmap shows 8 AI signal filters - SUCCESS
Safe Route AI page loads with route input form - SUCCESS

verified_features: Redis route caching with Nagarik:route:* keys (TTL 1800s)
Centralized osrm_service.py with self-hosted primary + public fallback
